summary: Mandi Custody Register feature fully tested - all backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mandi Custody Register feature tested and working. Sub-tab at Entries > Mandi Custody Register (data-testid='subtab-mandi-custody'). Table shows date-wise paddy procurement from different mandis with TOTAL (amber) and PROG.TOTAL (blue) columns. PDF and Excel exports work. Date filters work correctly.
